structured_output.reasoning: CVE-2023-48795 (Terrapin Attack) affects paramiko before 3.4.0 per the NVD. This repository uses paramiko==3.5.1 (requirements/base.txt:279) with pyproject.toml pinning >=3.4.0,<4.0 — well above the fix threshold. The scanner incorrectly flagged 3.5.1 as vulnerable. The DSSKey/sshtunnel compatibility concern only manifests with paramiko >=4.0 (DSSKey was removed in 4.0, not 3.x), and the existing <4.0 upper bound already prevents that breakage. No code change is required. Posted analysis as a comment on the source issue: https://github.com/michaelszhu/superset/issues/50#issuecomment-4786179534
